planName: Deqah / Comms / Phase 8 — Tenant Delivery Log
planSummary: Manual QA test plan for the tenant email delivery log page and fallback quota banner added in Phase 8.

cases.summary: [comms/delivery-log] GET /dashboard/comms/delivery-logs returns paginated items scoped to org
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Authenticate as a dashboard user (JWT)
2. GET /api/v1/dashboard/comms/delivery-logs
Expected: 200 with { items: [...], meta: { page, perPage, total, totalPages } } containing only records for the authenticated org

cases.summary: [comms/delivery-log] status filter returns only matching records
cases.text:
Steps:
1. GET /api/v1/dashboard/comms/delivery-logs?status=SENT
Expected: all returned items have status=SENT

cases.summary: [comms/delivery-log] channel filter returns only matching records
cases.text:
Steps:
1. GET /api/v1/dashboard/comms/delivery-logs?channel=EMAIL
Expected: all returned items have channel=EMAIL

cases.summary: [comms/delivery-log] cross-org isolation — org B cannot see org A records
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Authenticate as org A user
2. Insert delivery log records for org A
3. Authenticate as org B user
4. GET /api/v1/dashboard/comms/delivery-logs
Expected: org B sees 0 records from org A

Steps:
1. Authenticate as dashboard user
2. GET /api/v1/dashboard/comms/email-fallback-quota
Expected: 200 with { used: number, limit: number, periodStart: ISO string }

cases.summary: [comms/email-fallback-quota] limit=-1 returned when no subscription cached
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Ensure org has no active subscription cache entry
2. GET /api/v1/dashboard/comms/email-fallback-quota
Expected: limit=-1 (unlimited)

Steps:
1. Navigate to /settings/email-delivery-log in dashboard
Expected: page loads, table header visible with Channel/Status/To/Provider/Attempts/Sent At columns

Steps:
1. Open /settings/email-delivery-log
2. Select a status from the filter dropdown
Expected: table updates, only matching rows shown, Reset button appears

Steps:
1. Open /settings/email-delivery-log
2. Select a channel from the filter dropdown
Expected: table updates, only matching rows shown

Steps:
1. Apply status or channel filter
2. Click Reset
Expected: filters cleared, full list shown, Reset button hidden

Steps:
1. Apply a filter that matches no records
Expected: 'لا توجد سجلات إرسال' / 'No delivery records found' message shown

Steps:
1. Ensure >20 delivery log records exist
2. Open /settings/email-delivery-log
Expected: Prev/Next buttons visible, page indicator shows current/total

cases.summary: [dashboard/quota-banner] banner shows unlimited text when limit=-1
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Org has plan with email_fallback_monthly = -1 (unlimited)
2. Open /settings (email templates tab)
Expected: banner shows 'Unlimited emails this month' / 'إرسال غير محدود هذا الشهر'

cases.summary: [dashboard/quota-banner] banner shows progress bar and usage text when limit > 0
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Org has plan with email_fallback_monthly = 100
2. Some emails sent (used > 0)
3. Open email templates tab
Expected: banner shows 'X of 100 emails used this month' + progress bar

cases.summary: [dashboard/quota-banner] banner shows destructive state when used >= limit
cases.text:
Steps:
1. Org has plan with email_fallback_monthly = 10
2. used = 10 (at limit)
3. Open email templates tab
Expected: red/destructive banner with 'Monthly limit reached' message
